rationale: Active war continues at maximum background level; US attention split between Iran deal and Ukraine support remains the key external risk factor for Ukrainians.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: US diplomatic focus on Iran risks diverting attention and resources from Ukraine support. Continued uncertainty is a persistent threat to Ukrainian war effort.

top_events.title: Two killed in Israeli strike on Gaza
top_events.summary: Ongoing Middle East conflict keeps global attention fragmented, potentially reducing international focus on Ukraine's needs. Indirect background pressure.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for 'espionage activities'
top_events.summary: Rising US-China tensions could complicate Western coalition cohesion, but no direct immediate impact on Ukrainian war situation.
